Drag and Drop Upload Test Document

This document tests the drag and drop upload functionality.

File Information:
- Upload Method: Drag & Drop
- File Size: Small (for quick testing)
- Format: Plain Text
- Encoding: UTF-8

Test Scenario:
This file is dragged from the file system and dropped onto the upload zone to verify:
1. Drag and drop detection works
2. File is accepted and processed
3. Upload progress is shown
4. File appears in document list

Business Content:
Department: Operations
Process: File Upload Testing
Status: Active
Priority: High

Expected Result: File should be successfully uploaded via drag and drop interface.
